markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss hiring strategy and process for content editor/strategist roles](https://fathom.video/share/Qeo8sYW1v3pGy9eTLP6T84AKWgmsXXV9?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on finding candidates with "editor" experience rather than just writers](https://fathom.video/share/Qeo8sYW1v3pGy9eTLP6T84AKWgmsXXV9?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
  - [Update job titles to include "editor" and related keywords for better visibility](https://fathom.video/share/Qeo8sYW1v3pGy9eTLP6T84AKWgmsXXV9?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [Implement a multi-tier vetting process with video assessments for initial screening](https://fathom.video/share/Qeo8sYW1v3pGy9eTLP6T84AKWgmsXXV9?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Prioritize outreach to top candidates from agencies with proven experience](https://fathom.video/share/Qeo8sYW1v3pGy9eTLP6T84AKWgmsXXV9?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)

## Topics

### Candidate Search and Titles

  - [Update job titles to include "editor", "AI content", "SEO strategist" for better search visibility](https://fathom.video/share/Qeo8sYW1v3pGy9eTLP6T84AKWgmsXXV9?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [Suggested titles: "Managing Editor - AI Content & SEO Strategy", "Lead Editor, AI Content & SEO Strategist"](https://fathom.video/share/Qeo8sYW1v3pGy9eTLP6T84AKWgmsXXV9?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [Expand location searches beyond just Sri Lanka](https://fathom.video/share/Qeo8sYW1v3pGy9eTLP6T84AKWgmsXXV9?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

### Vetting Process

  - [Tier 1: Top candidates get personal outreach from Marcel, fast-tracked](https://fathom.video/share/Qeo8sYW1v3pGy9eTLP6T84AKWgmsXXV9?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
  - [Tier 2: Strong candidates with agency experience get pre-vetted and fast call](https://fathom.video/share/Qeo8sYW1v3pGy9eTLP6T84AKWgmsXXV9?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Tier 3: Regular applicants go through revised assessment process](https://fathom.video/share/Qeo8sYW1v3pGy9eTLP6T84AKWgmsXXV9?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)
  - [Implement video assessment (3-5 mins) as initial screening after application](https://fathom.video/share/Qeo8sYW1v3pGy9eTLP6T84AKWgmsXXV9?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Include personality assessment and practical writing/editing prompts](https://fathom.video/share/Qeo8sYW1v3pGy9eTLP6T84AKWgmsXXV9?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
  - [Avoid overreliance on multiple choice assessments](https://fathom.video/share/Qeo8sYW1v3pGy9eTLP6T84AKWgmsXXV9?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)

### Current Pipeline

  - [20+ active candidates - 8 in recruiter screen, 13 in assessments](https://fathom.video/share/Qeo8sYW1v3pGy9eTLP6T84AKWgmsXXV9?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Molly running new searches targeting agencies like 825, shantel.co](https://fathom.video/share/Qeo8sYW1v3pGy9eTLP6T84AKWgmsXXV9?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Marcel had 1 response so far from his outreach](https://fathom.video/share/Qeo8sYW1v3pGy9eTLP6T84AKWgmsXXV9?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)

### Next Steps

  - [Molly to update job postings with new titles and locations](https://fathom.video/share/Qeo8sYW1v3pGy9eTLP6T84AKWgmsXXV9?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [Marcel to revise assessment flow with video component in TestGorilla](https://fathom.video/share/Qeo8sYW1v3pGy9eTLP6T84AKWgmsXXV9?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)
  - [Determine practical writing/editing assignment for top candidates](https://fathom.video/share/Qeo8sYW1v3pGy9eTLP6T84AKWgmsXXV9?tab=summary&timestamp=1738.0)
  - [Marcel to add billing info to Upwork for company details](https://fathom.video/share/Qeo8sYW1v3pGy9eTLP6T84AKWgmsXXV9?tab=summary&timestamp=1820.0)
